_instructions: Rename this file to [series-slug].json before filling it in. Delete this _instructions field when done. Series configs are gitignored — they live on disk but are not committed.
description: One sentence: who is this series for and what does it cover.

parts.title: Overview — Setting the Stage
parts.topic: Full topic phrase for the intro/overview part — write as a complete sentence, not just keywords
search_queries: specific primary search query — most targeted
broader fallback query — used if primary yields fewer than 4 good articles
